results.title: 2027: Christians won’t support another Muslim-Muslim ticket – Vatsa
results.description: A chieftain of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Niger State, Hon. Jonathan Vatsa, has criticised the reported retention of Vice President Kashim Shettima as President Bola Tinubu’s running mate for the 2027 presidential election, saying another Muslim-Muslim ticket would not enjoy the support of many Christians. The post 2027: Christians won’t support another Muslim-Muslim ticket – Vatsa appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: Leo ♌ Weekly Horoscope (13th July - 19th July 2026): Major Success, Unexpected Recognition & Financial Growth Await Leo This Week
results.description: Leo Weekly Horoscope (13th July 2026 to 19th July 2026): Your Leo weekly horoscope indicates a positive and eventful week. The Moon remains in Gemini as the week begins. This encourages networking and teamwork. The Moon enters Cancer on 14th July 2026 in the evening. The Moon will then move into Leo on 16th July 2026 in the evening. The Moon will then move into Virgo on 18th July 2026 at night. You can focus on planning for self-growth and financial matters. The Sun, your ruling planet, enters Cancer on 16th July 2026 at night. This encourages introspection and careful planning. You should stay patient while Mercury remains retrograde in Gemini. Anand Sagar Pathak of Astropatri predicts in the Leo horoscope this week, unveiling insightful weekly astrology predictions for Leo that inspire purpose, balance, and strong self-expression across this weekly horoscope for Leo.

results.title: Experts urge early BP screening as youth hypertension rises
results.description: Young adults in India are increasingly developing high blood pressure, a condition once considered more prevalent in the middle and old ages, with cardiologists attributing the trend to sedentary lifestyles, obesity, chronic stress and unhealthy diets. They warned that many remain unaware of the problem until serious complications such as a heart attack, stroke or [...]

results.title: Mid Cap Stocks: CONCOR, APAR Industries and others - 6 top picks with up to 54% upside potential | LIST
results.description: InCred Equities has identified six midcap stock picks across sectors, citing attractive valuations despite market volatility. The brokerage sees upside potential of up to 54 per cent, with CONCOR leading its recommendations.

results.title: Stakeholders: PM, CMs removal clause 'unconstitutional'
results.description: A parliamentary panel noted concerns about the anti-corruption bill's arrest clause. Stakeholders found removing officials after thirty days constitutionally problematic. The draft report suggests a sunset clause for automatic reversal of barring. It also proposes using "suspension" instead of "removal" to avoid stigma. The committee's recommendations will be tabled in Lok Sabha soon.

results.title: World Envies Korea's Subway Screen Doors That Cut Deaths to Zero
results.description: Korea's subway platform screen doors reduced annual deaths from 37 to zero, drawing global attention as New York and London struggle with unprotected platforms.
